chatBot.greeting: Hallo {{name}}! Ich bin dein Shopping-Assistent. Wie kann ich dir heute helfen?
chatBot.help: Ich bin hier, um zu helfen. Frage mich nach Produkten, Bestellungen oder deinem Warenkorb!
chatBot.productInfo: Suchst du nach Produktinformationen? Ich kann dir helfen, das Richtige zu finden.
chatBot.orderStatus: Du kannst deine Bestelhistorie einsehen und Sendungen im Bereich Bestellungen verfolgen.
chatBot.fallback: Da bin ich mir nicht sicher. Versuche es mit 'Warenkorb zeigen' oder 'Was ist im Angebot?'.
chatBot.howCanIHelp: Wie kann ich dir heute helfen?
chatBot.helpDetails:
Ich kann dir helfen bei:
• Durchsuchen des **Produktkatalogs**
• Verwalten deines **Warenkorbs**
• Verfolgen deiner **Bestellungen**
• Finden von **Angeboten und Aktionen**
chatBot.responseCaVa: Mir geht es blendend, danke der Nachfrage! Wie kann ich dir behilflich sein?

services_local.plomberie_desc_long: Installation, repair and maintenance of your sanitation systems. We handle complex leaks, pipe unclogging and full bathroom renovations.
services_local.clim_desc_long: Comprehensive cooling systems expertise. From split installation to central AC maintenance, we ensure optimal comfort.
services_local.gaz_desc_long: Safety is our top priority. We perform gas installations to the highest safety standards.
services_local.gaz_desc_3: Safe connection for stoves and boilers
services_local.chauffage_desc_long: High-performance heating solutions for a worry-free winter. We install condensing boilers and serviced radiators.
services_local.service_before_plomberie: Old copper network with regular leaks
services_local.service_after_plomberie: New copper tubes with professional welds
services_local.service_before_gaz: Expired flexible gas hose and corroded valve
services_local.service_after_gaz: Rigid copper piping welded to STEG standards
services_local.service_before_chauffage: Cold radiators due to circuit sludge

informations_desc: Find all the legal information here about how our platform operates and how we protect your data.
privacy_intro: Your privacy is a priority. We only collect the data needed to deliver our services and improve your experience.
privacy_point_1: Minimal data collection for service requests and orders.
privacy_point_2: We never sell your contact details to third parties.
privacy_point_3: Sensitive data is protected with encryption and secure storage.
terms_intro: By using this site, you agree to the following terms of service.
terms_point_1: Services are provided based on the displayed information and availability.
terms_point_2: Abusive or fraudulent content is prohibited and may result in suspension.
terms_point_3: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time.
